gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/104)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/104)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَوْصِنِي فَقَالَ أَعِدَّ جَهَازَكَ وَ قَدِّمْ زَادَكَ وَ كُنْ وَصِيَّ نَفْسِكَ وَ لَا تَقُلْ لِغَيْرِكَ يَبْعَثُ إِلَيْكَ بِمَا يُصْلِحُكَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibrahim Bin Mahzam, from Anbasa Al Aabid who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘Advise me’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Prepare your apparatus and send forward your provision, and be your own executor, and do not say to others that they should send to you with what is adequate for you’.
en.sarwar: 29. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ibrahim ibn Mehzam from ‘Anbasah al-‘Abid who has narrated the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, to give me an advice. He (the Imam) said, ‘Prepare your supplies, send them ahead of you, be the executor of your own will and do not say to others to send for you what is good for your well-being. 5 ”
